_meta.method: Web search of Yun Hwa Sangha, Plum Village resources, and Tricycle coverage of Cem Şen's sangha
_meta.coverageEstimate: ~85% of publicly listed Istanbul Zen practice
knownGaps: Cem Şen's Turkish Buddhist sangha is well documented (Tricycle 2024) but uses cemsen.com as a teaching site rather than a sangha-specific URL
Istanbul Lotus River Sangha (Plum Village) is Facebook-only — included with Facebook URL

places.name: Istanbul Yun Hwa Dharma Sah
places.lineage: Korean Zen (Yun Hwa / World Social Buddhism — Ji Kwang Dae Poep Sa Nim)
places.address: Mehmet Şengün Sokak No 2, D 15, Fenerbahçe 34726, İstanbul
places.notes: First Yun Hwa Dharma Sah in Asia; opened 7 September 2013. Phone +90 543 965 41 77.

places.name: Istanbul Lotus River Sangha
places.lineage: Vietnamese Thiền (Plum Village / Thich Nhat Hanh)
places.notes: Plum Village mindfulness sangha in Istanbul. Active community of practitioners.

places.name: Cem Şen Sangha (Turkish Buddhist Sangha)
places.lineage: Zen (formal Zen training since 1989; founder student of İlhan Güngören)
places.notes: Turkey's principal Zen-trained Buddhist sangha. Founder Cem Şen (b. 1968, İzmir) began Zen training in 1989. Tricycle profile (2024) describes ~350 devotees over a decade.
